title: lib/reduce - Hadoop MapReduce Architecture
description: The lib/reduce directory is responsible for providing a high-level, architectural abstraction for the Hadoop MapReduce framework. It collaborates with other components to enable the execution of reduce tasks in a distributed environment. The directory follows the pattern of a wrapper class, encapsulating the functionality of a given Reducer to allow for custom Reducer.Context implementations. This pattern promotes modularity and extensibility, allowing developers to customize the behavior of reduce tasks without modifying the core logic of the framework. The WrappedReducer class plays a crucial role in the Hadoop MapReduce architecture, providing a flexible and extensible foundation for custom reduce task implementations.

The lib/reduce directory is responsible for providing a high-level, architectural abstraction for the Hadoop MapReduce framework. It collaborates with other components to enable the execution of reduce tasks in a distributed environment. The directory follows the pattern of a wrapper class, encapsulating the functionality of a given Reducer to allow for custom Reducer.Context implementations. This pattern promotes modularity and extensibility, allowing developers to customize the behavior of reduce tasks without modifying the core logic of the framework. The WrappedReducer class plays a crucial role in the Hadoop MapReduce architecture, providing a flexible and extensible foundation for custom reduce task implementations.
